title: briza minor var. virens
intro: Briza minor var. virens, also known as the lesser quaking grass or green quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Briza minor var. virens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, tincture, or salve to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
